title: Tabris S engine
wikitext:
[]: Tabris; SÂ² engine?             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Jan 27, 2006 2:33 pm Tabris (A.k.a. Kaworu) had an A.T, feild but did he have an SÂ² engine as well?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 27, 2006 2:41 pm Well, although we never got a look, during the shower scene Shinji would have spotted if he had a core to contain it, and would presumably have reacted to seeing it.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Fri Jan 27, 2006 4:45 pm Well Rei is similar to Kaworu, and we've err seen her naked as well, and she didn't appear to have one either.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jan 27, 2006 5:27 pm They both most likely have one, or something resembling it. The evidence is in episode #24', when they both unleash AT Fields. Hold that thought.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Fri Jan 27, 2006 7:14 pm Having an ATF doesn't mean you have an S2 engine. Humans have ATF's but no S2 engines.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 28, 2006 2:31 am Rei and Kaworu are vessals for the souls of Lilith and Adam respectively. The better question is whether or not Lilith and Adam have S2 engines. I can't recall at the moment whether the dialog at any point indicates this.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Jan 28, 2006 7:07 am Adam is shown to have something resembling a core in episode #12. Also, in episode #21' a scientist mentions that the S^2 theory is the only thing that can explain the giant's(Adam's) power. Lilith is never actually shown to have an S^2 organ of any kind. However, their energy must come from somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jan 28, 2006 7:12 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Adam is shown to have something resembling a core in episode #12. Also, in episode #21' a scientist mentions that the S^2 theory is the only thing that can explain the giant's(Adam's) power. Lilith is never actually shown to have an S^2 organ of any kind. However, their energy must come from somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Jan 29, 2006 1:10 pm Its not necessary for the core to be visible. And as it was said in the anime (don't ask, where), with an S^2 engine, the bearer can change its shape any time. How about the 16th Angel, Armisael? It could change its blood pattern and its form! And there was Israfael too, who could slip into two. About those two: Ayanami was a clone, whatever we do - her natural form was that girl. At least for her. And Kaoru was also shapechanged. A lil' question: who said, that the Angels we have seen were in their true form? And do they have one/any?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Jan 29, 2006 1:16 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: Its not necessary for the core to be visible. And as it was said in the anime (don't ask, where), with an S^2 engine, the bearer can change its shape any time.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Jan 29, 2006 1:27 pm Maybe I mixed some things up? Oh... :oops: man, shit happens... :roll: ... But I heard something somewhere, but I don't really know, where... Maybe it was about that they are made of light, or I don't know... Forget it! My memory is cloudy... sorry for that... :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Phoenix Feet » Sun Jan 29, 2006 7:50 pm Is it possible that the S^2 is only required to power the angel's bodies?

[]:             Quote Post by SkyFire360 » Sun Jan 29, 2006 8:21 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: Its not necessary for the core to be visible. And as it was said in the anime (don't ask, where), with an S^2 engine, the bearer can change its shape any time.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Jan 29, 2006 8:37 pm Well we see Rei all kinds of naked in the show and we see no external sign of a core or S2 so I don't think angel boy would have any external sign either.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Jan 30, 2006 1:44 am SkyFire360 wrote: FauÃŸtin wrote: Its not necessary for the core to be visible. And as it was said in the anime (don't ask, where), with an S^2 engine, the bearer can change its shape any time.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jan 30, 2006 1:59 am SkyFire360 wrote: didn't the series refer to the S2 engine both as an "engine" and an "organ"?

[]: Another viewpoint...             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Jan 31, 2006 2:27 pm From my perspective, SÂ² engines have little to do with the generation of an AT Field, remember, that all Lilim have AT Fields. Rei and Kaworu's AT Field unfoldment capabilities may simply be down to the fact that they are comprised of Angelic material or that their souls have some sort of Angelic element to them. I believe the SÂ² engine to simply be a 'heavenly' destructive device, directing huge amounts of energy using a torus reactor/tokamak reactor (or similar setup) to generate power (it would be possible to make one into a self-sustaining coil shape, no doubt). But, instead of using plasma within a tokamak reactor, imagine using a Angelic soul. Phew.

[]: Re: Another viewpoint...             Quote Post by Phoenix Feet » Tue Jan 31, 2006 8:50 pm Zugzwang wrote: I believe the SÂ² engine to simply be a 'heavenly' destructive device, directing huge amounts of energy using a torus reactor/tokamak reactor (or similar setup) to generate power (it would be possible to make one into a self-sustaining coil shape, no doubt). But, instead of using plasma within a tokamak reactor, imagine using a Angelic soul. Phew.

[]: Re: Another viewpoint...             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Feb 01, 2006 11:42 am Mr. Tines wrote: SkyFire360 wrote: didn't the series refer to the S2 engine both as an "engine" and an "organ"?

[]: Re: Another viewpoint...             Quote Post by SkyFire360 » Wed Feb 01, 2006 1:52 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: Zugzwang wrote: From my perspective, SÂ² engines have little to do with the generation of an AT Field, remember, that all Lilim have AT Fields.
